office.daily-report.label: 生成日报
office.daily-report.description: 把工作记录、文件和截图整理成今日工作总结
office.daily-report.prompt: 请基于我提供的材料生成一份今日工作日报。要求：1. 先列出今日完成事项；2. 总结关键进展和风险；3. 提炼明天待办；4. 输出适合直接发给团队或老板的 Markdown 版本。

office.files-to-ppt.label: 资料转 PPT
office.files-to-ppt.description: 把资料文件、网页或文件夹整理成汇报演示
office.files-to-ppt.prompt: 请把我提供的资料整理成一份汇报 PPT。先给出结构化大纲，再生成可编辑的 PPT 文件；如果资料不足，请先列出缺失信息。

office.excel-summary.label: 表格汇总分析
office.excel-summary.description: 汇总 Excel/CSV 数据并生成结论
office.excel-summary.prompt: 请读取我提供的表格数据，完成分类汇总、异常值标注、关键趋势分析，并输出一份整理后的表格和一段可直接汇报的结论。

content.topic-calendar.label: 选题日历
content.topic-calendar.description: 生成一周内容选题和发布节奏
content.topic-calendar.prompt: 请根据账号定位、目标受众和我提供的参考材料，生成未来一周内容选题日历。每个选题包含标题、核心观点、素材方向、发布平台和推荐发布时间。

content.competitor-research.label: 竞品调研
content.competitor-research.description: 整理竞品内容策略、亮点和机会
content.competitor-research.prompt: 请调研我提供的竞品或行业关键词，整理它们近期内容方向、爆款特征、用户反馈和可借鉴机会，并输出结构化报告。

content.short-video-script.label: 短视频脚本
content.short-video-script.description: 把主题整理成可拍摄脚本
content.short-video-script.prompt: 请根据我提供的主题生成短视频脚本。要求包含前 3 秒钩子、分镜、口播文案、画面建议、字幕重点和结尾引导。

office.daily-report.label: Daily Report
office.daily-report.description: Turn notes, files, and screenshots into a daily work summary
office.daily-report.prompt: Create a daily work report from the materials I provide. Include: 1. completed work today; 2. key progress and risks; 3. tomorrow's follow-up items; 4. a Markdown version ready to send to my team or manager.

office.files-to-ppt.label: Files to PPT
office.files-to-ppt.description: Turn files, webpages, or folders into a presentation
office.files-to-ppt.prompt: Turn the materials I provide into a presentation. First create a structured outline, then generate an editable PPT file. If the materials are insufficient, list the missing information first.

office.excel-summary.label: Spreadsheet Summary
office.excel-summary.description: Summarize Excel/CSV data and generate conclusions
office.excel-summary.prompt: Read the spreadsheet data I provide, produce grouped summaries, mark outliers, analyze key trends, and output both a cleaned spreadsheet and a concise conclusion I can use in a report.

content.topic-calendar.label: Topic Calendar
content.topic-calendar.description: Create a one-week content calendar and publishing rhythm
content.topic-calendar.prompt: Based on the account positioning, target audience, and reference materials I provide, create a one-week content topic calendar. Each topic should include a title, core angle, material direction, target platform, and recommended publishing time.

content.competitor-research.label: Competitor Research
content.competitor-research.description: Summarize competitor content strategy, highlights, and opportunities
content.competitor-research.prompt: Research the competitors or industry keywords I provide. Summarize recent content directions, high-performing patterns, user feedback, and opportunities we can learn from. Output a structured report.

content.short-video-script.label: Short Video Script
content.short-video-script.description: Turn a topic into a shoot-ready script
content.short-video-script.prompt: Create a short video script from the topic I provide. Include a first-three-second hook, shot plan, voiceover copy, visual suggestions, subtitle highlights, and closing call to action.
